query: SELECT id, hostName, bio, profilePhotoUrl, foodPhotoUrls FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' OR id = 2;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, bio, profilePhotoUrl, foodPhotoUrls FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' OR id = 2;

rows.bio: Hi! I'm Chuan, I'm a freelance designer. Since I moved to my current home, I've been hosting dinners every now and then! I enjoy interactions on dinner table. It’s one way we get close to our friends and loved ones.
